race.description: Macedon Ranges Ag Machinery Maiden Plate
race.comment: ZOUSOUTH (10) disappointed last start at Werribee, when beaten over 4 lengths, but was very good when second the start prior and, importantly, has the ability to make use of the gun draw. Respecting all of the first starters. SINGAPORE SPLASH (8) wasn't knocked around at his first jumpout this time in but dominated on-speed at the most recent and can make an early impression here. PLAYFUL AS (13) has the gate to ensure he'll be prominent early, which has him in contention. SUN DEVIL (9) is in good hands and has been given three jumpouts this time in so he won't be wanting for fitness. Include.
